name: Fireflies
description: A handful of soft glowing sparks drifting around the window in the clear margin outside its frame, each blinking on its own rhythm. The swarm dims when the surface loses focus. Count, spark size, drift range, drift speed and the two spark colours are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Drift range
parameters.description: How far outside the frame the sparks roam (px)

parameters.name: Spark count
parameters.description: How many sparks drift around the window

parameters.name: Spark size
parameters.description: Radius of each spark's glowing core (px)

parameters.name: Drift speed
parameters.description: How quickly the sparks wander and blink

parameters.name: First colour
parameters.description: Warm spark colour, mixed per spark with the second colour

parameters.name: Second colour
parameters.description: Cool spark colour, mixed per spark with the first colour
